deceasedcraft.difficulty.easy:
§aEasy Difficulty§r
§a50%%§r reduced global enemy spawns.
§a50%%§r less enemy health and damage.
§a25%%§r more loot in all containers.
deceasedcraft.difficulty.normal:
§fNormal Difficulty§r
No modifiers.
The §fstandard§r difficulty for this modpack.
deceasedcraft.difficulty.hard:
§cHard Difficulty§r
Rebalanced, §charder§r enemies in all districts.
Loot in containers reduced by §c50%%§r.
Death will §creduce§r your max health from unique foods, requiring you to eat them again.
More §cfrequent§r, §cbuffed§r and §clonger§r horde waves.
Contraptionquest.tech.create.contraption: Contraption mechanisms allow players to make structures that can interract with the world.
&cNote&r: Only vanilla Minecraft and Create Containers allow storing items in a contraption.
Max amount of blocks that can be in a Contraiption is &b384.&r
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.desc_1: Restricts access of a drawer to only the locking player.
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.desc_2: &cWARNING: DOES NOT MAKE THE DRAWER UNBREAKABLE.&r
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.subtitle: My precious...
guide.quest.drawers.personalkey.title: Personal Key
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.desc_1: Restricts access of a drawer to the locking player, as well as their team.
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.desc_2: &cWARNING: DOES NOT MAKE THE DRAWER UNBREAKBLE.&r
guide.quest.drawers.teamkey.title: Team Key
